loss_definition: max(no-water-stress production - water-stress production, 0) / no-water-stress production
area_conversion: cellarea m2 converted to hectares before multiplying GAEZ potential yield in t/ha
note: Historical SD/CI uses annual samples. Future annual summary uses GCM-year samples; future GCM-period summary first averages each GCM within a period, then estimates SD/CI across GCMs.
